creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to Barbara Guida from comment #5)

make showconfig -C /usr/ports/security/cryptopp/
===> The following configuration options are available for cryptopp-5.6.2_2:
     DEBUG=off: Build with debugging support
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     GCC=off: Build with modern GCC (from ports)
     STATIC=on: Build static version only (no shared libs)
     THREADS=on: Threading support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

pkg info -lx cryptopp | grep lib
        /usr/local/include/cryptopp/cryptlib.h
        /usr/local/include/cryptopp/zlib.h
        /usr/local/lib/libcryptopp.a
